title: 2026 Golden Globes Awards Winners Summary
text: The 83rd Golden Globes ceremony held on January 11, 2026, delivered largely predictable results alongside a few notable surprises. One Battle After Another dominated the film categories, securing four awards including Best Film Comedy/Musical, Best Director, Best Screenplay for Paul Thomas Anderson, and Best Supporting Actress for Teyana Taylor. The evening's biggest surprise came when Hamnet claimed Best Film Drama, revitalizing a film that had lost momentum in recent weeks. Star Jessie Buckley won Best Drama Actress for the role. International cinema performed strongly, with Brazil's The Secret Agent winning Best Non-English Language Film and Best Drama Actor for Wagner Moura. The animated phenomenon KPop Demon Hunters took home Best Animated Feature and Best Song for its track Golden. Timothée Chalamet and Rose Byrne won lead acting honors in the Comedy/Musical category for Marty Supreme and If I Had Legs I'd Kick You respectively. Emmy repeat winners dominated television categories. The Pitt secured Best Drama Series and Best Drama Actor with Noah Wyle, while The Studio won Best Comedy Series with Seth Rogen taking Best Comedy Actor. Jean Smart repeated her Emmy victory for Best Comedy Actress from Hacks. Adolescence emerged as the night's major TV winner with four awards, including Best Limited Series and acting victories for Stephen Graham, Erin Doherty, and Owen Cooper.
